body_transformation: Butterfree's rounded head retains its shape but now wears a polished steel plating with subtle engraved geometric patterns matching its original blue accents. Its large wings are transformed into rigid, articulated metal panels with sharp angular edges, their intricate purple and blue patterns replaced by glowing steel-blue energy lines. The white body base color shifts to gunmetal gray, now textured with smooth reflective surfaces and deep indigo highlights along joint areas. Red eye coloration becomes chrome silver with indigo energy pulses, maintaining the large eye structure but appearing as polished mechanical lenses.
signature_feature: Wings: rigid steel panels with glowing blue energy lines and sharp angular edges.
